title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 12 2025
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 12 2025
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 12 2025
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 12/02/2025
Today, iron ore futures fluctuated upward, with the most-traded I2505 contract closing at 828.5 yuan/mt,up 0.91% for the day. Traders showed strong enthusiasm for selling. Steel mills adopted a more cautious sentiment, purchasing as needed.
